seoTitle: Stony Rise vs Stoodley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Stony Rise and Stoodley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Stony Rise vs Stoodley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Stony Rise and Stoodley.
heading: Stony Rise vs Stoodley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Stony Rise, Tasmania and Stoodley, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Stony Rise has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Stoodley (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Stony Rise or Stoodley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Stony Rise has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Stoodley scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Stony Rise scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Stoodley scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Stony Rise or Stoodley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Stony Rise has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
